note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

juvenile.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

location_town.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

the_attorney_for_the_state.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

is_currently_in_the_custody_of_the_depar.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

respectfully_represent_that.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

into.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

time_1.guidance: A wall-clock time (e.g. 10:00). If the form pre-prints AM/PM, circle/strike the correct one by hand — the engine does not.

place_1.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

time_2.guidance: A wall-clock time (e.g. 10:00). If the form pre-prints AM/PM, circle/strike the correct one by hand — the engine does not.

place_2.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

undefined.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

printed_name_and_bar_no.guidance: An attorney's Maine bar registration number.
